_meta.purpose: Safety-clean image prompts for The Strategic Force Assessment. Generates a painterly space-opera concept-art set: 5 archetype portraits × 3 gender variants + 7 scene images. Run generate-images.js with a Gemini API key.
_meta.art_direction: Painterly space-opera concept art in the tradition of 1970s analogue matte painting. Cinematic, editorial, dark register, near-black backgrounds, single warm orange light source per frame. Generous negative space, atmospheric haze, melancholic composition, original characters and locations.
_meta.palette: Near-black #0c0a0a base · warm orange #FF481D · tangerine #FF6B00 · warm off-white #ECE5D7
rewrite_rules_applied: De-Brand: franchise references swapped for descriptive genres (space opera, desert sci-fi, etc.)
Descriptive Stylizing: artist names replaced with technique descriptions (1970s matte painting, painterly analogue concept art)
Genericize Technology: IP-specific objects replaced with functional descriptions (water-reclamation spire, transport convoy)
Positive-only descriptions: avoided constraint phrases such as 'no IP' or 'no text'
Technical precision preserved: hex codes, aspect ratios, lighting terms (rim light, anamorphic flare) kept verbatim

_genders.she: female-presenting protagonist — woman, athletic build, mid-30s, expressive but composed
_genders.he: male-presenting protagonist — man, athletic build, mid-30s, expressive but composed
_genders.they: androgynous-presenting protagonist — gender-ambiguous, athletic build, mid-30s, neutral features

reactive_defender.subject: Defensive crouch, shielding from ember-sparks. Distant fire glow.
reactive_defender.prompt_template: EDGE-TO-EDGE FRAMING, NO BORDER, NO TEXT. This is a full-bleed cinematic still: the subject and background extend to every edge of the frame like a frame grab from a film, cropped at the rectangle's edges. Do not draw a border, frame, white margin, paper edge, matting, decorative trim or vignette around the image. Do not render any text, typography, caption, title, label, signature, logo or watermark anywhere — even in the corners. Painterly space-opera concept art in the tradition of 1970s analogue matte painting. {genderDesc} in a defensive crouch on a wind-scoured rocky platform, body angled away from oncoming threat, one arm raised to shield the face. Glowing ember-sparks streak in from camera-right. Deep warm-orange rim light from a distant fire on the horizon. Near-black background, dust and ash in the air, anamorphic flare. 1:1 square aspect ratio, melancholic atmosphere. Single warm orange light source. Palette near-black, warm orange #FF481D and #FF6B00, warm off-white. Painterly, dramatic, generous negative space. (Reminder: edge-to-edge, no border, no text.)
